source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local principle grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.6
distilled_thesis: Gift appears here in two coordinated modes, bestowal and distribution, so giving is already articulated as more than a single undifferentiated outpouring.
